Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/preferSchemaOverJson_preview.ts(7,10): warning TS377026: This code uses `JSON.parse` or `JSON.stringify`. Effect Schema provides Effect-aware APIs for JSON parsing and stringifying. effect(preferSchemaOverJson)


==== /.src/preferSchemaOverJson_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics preferSchemaOverJson:warning
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    
    export const preview = Effect.gen(function*() {
      const text = yield* Effect.succeed('{"ok":true}')
      return JSON.parse(text)
             ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377026: This code uses `JSON.parse` or `JSON.stringify`. Effect Schema provides Effect-aware APIs for JSON parsing and stringifying. effect(preferSchemaOverJson)
    })
